name: claude-design-toolkit
description: Production-grade design workflow for Claude Code — atomic doc structure, slot-focused component specs, W3C tokens, agent role files, mandatory pre/post-flight skills, handoff readiness.

plugins.name: design-core
plugins.description: REQUIRED. Core skills (design-edit, design-verify), 6 agent role files, validation hook, TaskCompleted quality gate, design-setup command, all templates.

plugins.name: design-tokens
plugins.description: OPTIONAL. W3C Design Tokens 2025.10 template + build script that generates Swift / CSS / JSON constants. Install when targeting iOS / Android / multi-platform.

plugins.name: design-handoff
plugins.description: OPTIONAL. Acceptance-criteria runner + drift-checker CLI + handoff-validator agent. Install when project is ready to hand to an iOS engineer (or another Claude).
